title: atractocarpus mollis
intro: Atractocarpus mollis, also known as the velvet starfruit or velvet-leaved starfruit, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting wound healing. Atractocarpus mollis is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture to be used in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
